chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Applications 02 & 03 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA 237/2014. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 These references are pending since 2014 without any progress. Even today the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification; therefore, the instant reference applications are dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). Office to place a copy hereof in connected matter. Judge Judge M. Khan
